summary: Comprehensive unit test suite covers all core requirements: manifest parsing (package.json, requirements.txt), license classification logic, report generation, and CLI integration. Includes well-designed mocking strategy for offline determinism. Integration harness (run_act_tests.py) properly validates workflow structure and assertion patterns. Main gaps: fixture data under tests/fixtures/case_*/ not shown, so cannot evaluate act-based test coverage or expected output assertions. Some edge cases (very large manifests, special characters in names, malformed requirements.txt lines) lack explicit tests. Integration harness is complex with multiple moving parts; relies on external tools (act, actionlint, docker) introducing potential brittleness. Unit tests are readable, independent, and well-organized; good use of pytest patterns and error assertions.
